title: Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
summary: Google Cloud Spanner now supports hybrid search combining full-text and vector search capabilities. The tool enables building AI-powered applications with multi-model queries, contextual search, and RAG applications integrated with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform.
writeup: This video covers hybrid search in Google Cloud Spanner, which combines full-text and vector search in a single system. The capability supports multi-model queries, contextual search, and RAG applications, with integration into the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform. The takeaway is that AI-powered applications can draw context from both keyword and semantic retrieval directly within Spanner.
